task_completion.description: Navigate to the repository settings for 'example-repo-local'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JFrog Artifactory web interface with the 'Edit Local Repository' or settings page open specifically for the Repository Key 'example-repo-local'.
The 'Description' text input field must contain exactly 'Production artifacts for the commons library team'.
The 'Includes Pattern' text input field must contain exactly 'org/apache/**,com/google/**'.
The 'Excludes Pattern' text input field must contain exactly '**/*-SNAPSHOT*/**'.
The 'Notes' (or 'Internal Description') text area must contain exactly 'Managed by Platform Engineering. Contact: platform-team@example.com'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with JFrog Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the JFrog Artifactory UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine JFrog Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the actual JFrog Artifactory dashboard (typically featuring the JFrog logo and standard layout), not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply echo the expected values into a terminal or text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected configuration values must be entered into the correct form fields within the Artifactory web application, not just printed on screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target repository is 'example-repo-local'. The required configuration values are: Description = 'Production artifacts for the commons library team', Includes Pattern = 'org/apache/**,com/google/**', Excludes Pattern = '**/*-SNAPSHOT*/**', and Notes = 'Managed by Platform Engineering. Contact: platform-team@example.com'.
